Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1210 "DARKCAVES-1210" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Dark Caves.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Removed the call to the kernal save routine ($F5ED) at $2F6C to remove high score saving to disk.
